title: Power Consumption Entry
description: Supply current draw for a specific operating mode, used for power budgeting

mode.description: Operating mode name (e.g. active, sleep, shutdown, tx, rx, idle)

description.description: Human-readable description of the mode and its conditions

rail.description: Power rail ID this current is drawn from (references a rail in the component's rails array)

current.description: Typical supply current in this mode (e.g. {value: 5, unit: mA})

current_max.description: Maximum supply current in this mode

conditions.description: Measurement conditions as stated in the datasheet (e.g. VDD=3.3V, f=64MHz, all peripherals on)

remark.description: Free-form note about this power mode (e.g. excludes crystal oscillator current, minimum load required)
